content_markdown:
# Unwavering Resolve
## Scripture
"Do you not know that in a race all the runners run, but only one gets the prize? So run as to get the prize." – 1 Corinthians 9:24
## Reflection
As warriors of Christ, we are called to persevere through trials and challenges. Our faith is not a sprint, but a marathon. We must run with unwavering resolve, focusing on the prize that awaits us in heaven. We must not give up, even when the road ahead seems daunting. We must press on, relying on God's strength and provision. Our resolve is not in our own strength, but in the power of the Holy Spirit. We are not alone in this journey; we are part of a larger community of believers who are also running the same race. Let us draw strength from one another and from our Lord, that we may finish the course with joy and triumph.
## Daily Challenge
"Run 50 yards while praising God for His unwavering strength and provision in your life."
